pageContext.name: Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Tribute
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue.  The Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue measures 23 tall and 19.5 wide as an expertly sculpted homage to the renowned Chinese actor, bodybuilder, and martial artist famed for his antagonistic action movie roles opposite the likes of Jean-Claude Van Damme and others. This ultra-realistic and highly detailed statue showcases the athleticism, intensity, and immense discipline exhibited by Yeung in celebrated film appearances that made him a fan-favorite on-screen fighter.  Inspired by an iconic era of his prolific career, the Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Tribute 1:3 Statue is a mixed media collectible with a fully sculpted athletic physique costumed with red and black fabric shorts and a red fabric belt. The hanging tails of the white and red headband sculpted onto his portrait are also fabric for added realism. Standing on a bronze-colored base with dragon detailing, he strikes a wide stance and stays light on his taped feet in preparation for another fight. Bolo Yeung's furious expression is framed by shaggy black hair, and his flexing muscles indicate that he is a formidable foe and a perfect centerpiece for any fan's action movie display.  Give your collection a sporting chance and bring home the Bolo Yeung: Kung Fu Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
